vehicle: BMW E65 730li 2007 GCC spec, N52B30 engine
notes: Top common faults curated for E65 N52B30. Each entry: symptoms, root cause, parts cost (EUR estimate), labour estimate, DIY difficulty 1-5, related DTCs.

faults.title: Valve cover gasket leak
faults.symptoms: Burning oil smell after driving. Oil drips on hot exhaust. Misfires (oil in spark plug wells) — P0301-P0306. Oil pooled around cyl 1 area.
faults.cause: Rubber valve cover gasket hardens with heat over 80-120k km. Original PA66 gasket fails predictably.
faults.fix: Replace valve cover gasket. Include spark plug seal washers and crankcase ventilation hose. Use Genuine Elring or Victor Reinz parts.

faults.title: Crankcase Ventilation (CCV) oil separator fault
faults.symptoms: Rough idle, lean codes, whistling sound from intake, oil consumption increases. May draw oil into intake.
faults.cause: CCV diaphragm cracks with age — universal N52 failure point around 100-150k km.
faults.fix: Replace complete CCV unit + hoses (kit available). Comes with new oil dipstick tube seal.

faults.title: Electric water pump + thermostat failure
faults.symptoms: Overheating warning, coolant temp climbing in traffic. Sometimes no warning, just sudden temperature spike.
faults.cause: Electric water pump motor fails (typical 120k km on N52). Plastic impeller cracks. Thermostat usually goes around same time — replace together.
faults.fix: Replace electric water pump (Pierburg OEM) + thermostat. DO NOT use cheap aftermarket pumps — they fail in months. Bleed cooling system properly.

faults.title: Coolant expansion tank cracks
faults.symptoms: Coolant smell from engine bay, slow coolant loss, sometimes white smoke at startup. Crack visible on tank or near upper hose.
faults.cause: Plastic expansion tank brittles with age + heat cycles. Common on 7+ year old E65s.
faults.fix: Replace expansion tank, cap, and upper radiator hose if it's the same age. €80 part.

faults.title: Drive belt pulley failure (idler/tensioner)
faults.symptoms: Squealing or grinding noise from front of engine. Belt may shred. Can throw belt = loss of power steering + alternator.
faults.cause: Idler/tensioner bearings dry out around 120k km. Standard wear item.
faults.fix: Replace both idler pulleys, tensioner, and drive belt together. €120 in parts + tools.

faults.title: VANOS solenoid (intake or exhaust)
faults.symptoms: Hesitation when accelerating, power loss, rough cold start, MIL light. Can be intermittent.
faults.cause: Oil sludge clogs the VANOS solenoid internal mesh. Failed oil changes accelerate this.
faults.fix: Remove solenoid, clean with brake/carb cleaner, refit. If no improvement, replace (€80 each). Do oil change with full BMW LL-01 5W-30.

faults.title: Timing chain stretch (N52/N51)
faults.symptoms: Rattle on cold start (1-3 sec), then quiets. P0016/P0017 codes. Eventually constant rattle, misfires, no-start risk.
faults.cause: Plastic chain guides wear, chain stretches. Less common than N51/N53 but happens on high-mileage N52.
faults.fix: MAJOR job — replace timing chain, both guides, tensioner, sprocket. €1500-2500 specialist work. Don't delay if you hear rattle.

faults.title: Ignition coils + spark plugs
faults.symptoms: Misfires (P0300-P0306), shudder at idle, power loss. Often one coil fails at a time.
faults.cause: Coils last 60-100k km on N52. Plugs every 60k km (NGK or Bosch OE).
faults.fix: Replace all 6 coils + 6 plugs at once for reliability. €180 parts. Use Bosch ZS-K coils OEM.

faults.title: DISA intake runner valve
faults.symptoms: Power loss at mid-rpm, rattling sound from intake manifold (broken DISA flap), check engine light.
faults.cause: Plastic flap/pivot wears out, can break and fall into engine = catastrophic. Around 100-150k km failure point.
faults.fix: Replace DISA valve. OEM only — aftermarket DISAs have flap failures. €150 part + 1h labour.

faults.title: Alternator decoupler pulley failure
faults.symptoms: Whining noise, alternator-area rattle, charging warnings, dimming headlights.
faults.cause: OAD (overrunning alternator decoupler) clutch fails around 150k km.
faults.fix: Replace decoupler pulley alone (€80) or full alternator if internal damage. Special tool needed for pulley removal.

faults.title: Battery / alternator charging system
faults.symptoms: Battery dies overnight, slow cranking, charge warning. Random module faults (low voltage causes phantom errors).
faults.cause: OEM 90Ah AGM battery lasts 5-7 years in GCC heat. Alternator brushes wear at 200k km. IBS sensor on negative terminal needs to know battery condition.
faults.fix: Replace battery (BMW AGM €250). REGISTER new battery to IBS via ISTA/INPA — otherwise alternator under-charges new battery. Critical step often skipped.

faults.title: Logic 7 / Top HiFi amplifier failure
faults.symptoms: Only one speaker works (driver-left only via ASK/CCC backup amp). All other speakers silent. Sometimes crackling before failure. Note: Basic Hi-Fi amp has NO diagnostic capability — only Logic 7 reports faults via MOST.
faults.cause: Capacitor failure inside DSP amp (Logic 7 only). Water ingress at amp location is common on E65 (boot seal leaks). Logic 7 connects to ASK via MOST bus.
faults.fix: Logic 7 amp is in the LEFT REAR corner of the trunk (per BMW Service Training). Pull left trim panel. Send to specialist (BBA-Reman, ACtronics) for rebuild €300-450. Or buy used (lottery), or DIY recap (€20 parts).

faults.title: CCC (Car Communication Computer) failure
faults.symptoms: Navigation freezes, black screen, no audio, system reboots randomly. Hard drive failure or solder issue.
faults.cause: Internal HDD failure. CCC mainboard solder cracks. Heat-related.
faults.fix: CCC repair specialist (€300-500). Or replace with used unit + coding to your VIN. CIC retrofit possible but complex.

faults.title: Door wiring loom break (hinge boot)
faults.symptoms: Window won't operate from one switch, door lock intermittent, mirror adjustment fails, speaker silent. Symptoms change when door moved.
faults.cause: Wiring inside the rubber hinge boot cracks from repeated door opening. More common on driver door.
faults.fix: Open the rubber boot, inspect wires, splice broken conductors. €20 in heatshrink + crimps. Or replace the door harness section.

faults.title: Fuel pump module / level sender
faults.symptoms: Random cranking issues, fuel gauge inaccurate or stuck. Twin-sender E65 tank has known jump-at-half issue.
faults.cause: Pump aging or twin level sender (one each side of saddle tank) goes out of calibration.
faults.fix: Replace fuel pump assembly (€250). Both senders renewed at once. Specialist for tank access.

faults.title: Air suspension compressor failure (rear)
faults.symptoms: Rear sits low, especially overnight. Compressor runs constantly. Suspension fault message in iDrive.
faults.cause: E65 has rear air suspension. Compressor wears out (€400 OEM). Or air spring/bladder leaks.
faults.fix: Diagnose with soapy water — air leak from bladder. Or compressor brushes worn = noise. €400-700 in parts.

faults.title: A/C compressor clutch (GCC critical)
faults.symptoms: Weak cooling, A/C cycles rapidly, eventually no cold air. Most common GCC complaint due to heat stress.
faults.cause: Clutch coil burns out OR refrigerant leak from condenser/lines. GCC cars run A/C 10 months/year — high failure rate.
faults.fix: Pressure test first (€20). Recharge with R134a if just low (€50). Clutch coil replacement €150. Full compressor €600.

faults.title: HVAC blower motor noise / failure
faults.symptoms: Squealing or grinding from dashboard. Reduced airflow. Eventually no blower.
faults.cause: Blower bearings dry out from desert dust. Resistor pack burns out (E65 has stepless control via FSR resistor).
faults.fix: Replace blower motor (€200) or FSR final stage resistor (€80). Access via glove box drop.

faults.title: ELV / Steering column lock failure
faults.symptoms: Will not start, key fob unrecognized, 'Steering wheel lock not released' error. Common E65 fault.
faults.cause: ELV (Electronic steering Lock) motor or controller fails. Used to be epidemic on E65/E66.
faults.fix: Replace ELV unit. Coding required. €300-600 parts + specialist labour. Permanent disable kits exist (questionable legality).

faults.title: ZF 6HP19 transmission fluid service
faults.symptoms: Harsh shifts, slippage, hesitation between gears. BMW claims 'sealed for life' — but fluid degrades at 100k km.
faults.cause: ATF degrades, mechatronic valves stick, internal seals dry out. 'Lifetime' fluid is a myth.
faults.fix: ZF Lifeguard 6 fluid + filter + pan gasket service every 60-80k km. Done WARM. Specialist with BMW software for level setting (relies on transmission temperature).

faults.title: Fuel filler neck / pump corrosion
faults.symptoms: Fuel smell at fill-up, EVAP codes, intermittent fuel cap warnings.
faults.cause: Filler neck rusts where it joins the tank — less common in GCC dry climate.
faults.fix: Replace filler neck section. €200 part + labour to drop tank partially.

faults.title: Front control arm (lollipop) bushings
faults.symptoms: Steering wander, knocking over bumps, vague feel, uneven tyre wear inner edge.
faults.cause: Rubber 'lollipop' bushings wear around 100k km. Standard wear item.
faults.fix: Replace both control arms (€200 pair Lemforder OEM). Press job — specialist or workshop. 4-wheel alignment after.

faults.title: ABS/DSC pump failure
faults.symptoms: DSC light + ABS light on dashboard. Brake pedal feels different. Hill Descent inoperative.
faults.cause: Hydraulic pump or solenoid pack fails. E65 known issue around 150k km.
faults.fix: Replace DSC hydraulic unit (€800 OEM) + coding. Rebuilt options €400. Specialist work.

faults.title: TPMS sensor failure (RDC)
faults.symptoms: TPMS warning persists, no live pressure reading. E65 uses RDC (Tire Pressure Monitoring System).
faults.cause: Sensor batteries last 5-7 years. GCC heat shortens battery life.
faults.fix: Replace failed sensor (€80 each) + program to vehicle. Garage with diagnostic kit.

faults.title: Soft-close door (SCA) actuator
faults.symptoms: Door closes only with hard slam, soft-close motor inoperative, possible noise.
faults.cause: Actuator motor or microswitch fails. Common on E65 with comfort access option.
faults.fix: Replace door actuator (€250) — needs door card removal. Coding may be required.

faults.title: Xenon HID ballast failure
faults.symptoms: One headlight out, flickering, color shift to pink/blue. Headlight self-test errors.
faults.cause: Ballast or D2S bulb. Bulbs every 5 years, ballasts 8-10 years.
faults.fix: Replace bulb first (€40 Philips D2S). If still dead, ballast €150. AL-Bosch ballast on E65.

faults.title: Comfort Access not detecting key
faults.symptoms: Have to press unlock button on fob — passive entry doesn't work. Engine start works because of immobilizer.
faults.cause: Outer door handle antenna fails (lots of them — 4 doors + boot). Or CAS module receiver.
faults.fix: Diagnose with ISTA which antenna is failing. Replace antenna in handle €60-120. CAS rare failure.

faults.title: iDrive controller / CCC freezes
faults.symptoms: Screen freezes, no response to controller, sometimes reboots. May affect radio/nav/phone.
faults.cause: Software bug. HDD aging. Bad MOST connection.
faults.fix: Reset: hold power button 8 sec. If recurring, software update via ISTA. CCC HDD replacement if persistent.

faults.title: Electric parking brake actuator (EMF)
faults.symptoms: Park brake won't engage/release. Warning lights. Cannot do brake service without ISTA to retract pistons.
faults.cause: EMF actuator motor or switch wears. Rear caliper electric pistons stick.
faults.fix: Need ISTA to service rear brakes (retract pistons via diagnostic). Actuator €300 replace. Calipers €400 each if seized.

faults.title: Oil filter housing gasket leak
faults.symptoms: Oil leak down side of engine. Oil on alternator (dangerous). Drips under car.
faults.cause: OFH gasket hardens. N52 known issue around 100k km.
faults.fix: Replace OFH gasket (€20 part) + crush washer for drain plug. 1.5h labour. Easy DIY but tight access.

faults.title: Rear subframe bushings
faults.symptoms: Clunk over bumps from rear, rear-end feels loose, alignment shifts.
faults.cause: Rubber bushings deteriorate at 150k km. GCC heat accelerates.
faults.fix: Replace 4 subframe bushings. Press job — specialist or workshop. Powerflex polyurethane upgrade option.
